MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar May-21-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT NAVIGATORS INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Defendant Navigators Insurance Company's unopposed Motion to Admit Pro Hac Vice Counsel Michael P. Duffy is GRANTED.

Good cause appearing, counsel Michael P. Duffy may appear as counsel pro hac vice for Moving Party in this action.

A proposed order has been submitted.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: R. Woods. Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
